homepage.heroSubline: Durable fences built to withstand the Arizona climate. Custom solutions for lasting security and style.
aboutText: Orta Metalworks LLC was founded over a decade ago with a simple mission: to provide Tucson and surrounding communities with superior fencing solutions. What started as a small operation has grown into a trusted name, synonymous with quality and reliability.

We approach every project with meticulous attention to detail, ensuring that each fence is not only aesthetically pleasing but also structurally sound. Our team is dedicated to exceeding expectations, from initial consultation to final installation.

We're proud to be a part of the Tucson community. We source materials locally whenever possible and actively support local initiatives. Our commitment extends beyond building fences; it's about building relationships and contributing to the well-being of our neighbors.

services.name: Wrought Iron Fences
services.shortDescription: Elegant and durable wrought iron fences for lasting security and beauty.
services.description:
Wrought iron fences offer a timeless aesthetic and unparalleled durability, making them a popular choice for Tucson homeowners. At Orta Metalworks LLC, we specialize in crafting custom wrought iron fences that enhance the security and curb appeal of your property. Our experienced team meticulously fabricates each fence to your exact specifications, ensuring a perfect fit and lasting performance in the harsh Arizona climate.

We use only the highest quality materials and employ proven techniques to create wrought iron fences that can withstand the test of time. Whether you're looking for a classic design or a more contemporary style, we can bring your vision to life. From intricate scrollwork to clean, modern lines, our wrought iron fences are a testament to our commitment to craftsmanship.

Our Tucson climate demands fences that can handle intense sun and occasional monsoon rains. Wrought iron, when properly treated and maintained, provides exceptional longevity. We offer various finishes and coatings to protect your fence from rust and corrosion, ensuring years of trouble-free performance. Invest in the enduring beauty and security of a wrought iron fence from Orta Metalworks LLC.
process: Step 1: Consultation and Design – We discuss your needs and create a custom design.
Step 2: Fabrication – Our skilled craftsmen meticulously fabricate your fence.
Step 3: Preparation – We prepare the installation site, ensuring proper foundations.
Step 4: Installation – We expertly install your fence with precision and care.

faq.question: How long will a wrought iron fence last in Tucson's climate?
faq.answer: With proper maintenance and protective coatings, a wrought iron fence from Orta Metalworks LLC can last for decades, even in the harsh Arizona climate.

faq.question: Can you customize the design of my wrought iron fence?
faq.answer: Absolutely! We specialize in custom designs and can create a fence that perfectly complements your home's architecture and your personal style.

faq.question: What type of maintenance is required for wrought iron fences?
faq.answer: Regular cleaning and occasional touch-up painting are typically all that's needed to keep your wrought iron fence looking its best. We also offer maintenance services to ensure its longevity.

services.name: Chain Link Fences
services.shortDescription: Affordable and practical chain link fences for security and containment.
services.description:
Chain link fences are a cost-effective and versatile solution for securing your property in Tucson. At Orta Metalworks LLC, we provide professional chain link fence installation services for residential, commercial, and industrial properties. Our chain link fences are built to withstand the elements while providing reliable security and containment.

We offer a variety of chain link fence options, including different heights, gauges, and coatings, to meet your specific needs. Whether you're looking to enclose a backyard, secure a construction site, or protect a commercial property, we have a chain link fence solution for you. Our experienced team ensures proper installation, ensuring that your fence is sturdy, secure, and long-lasting.

Tucson's desert environment can be tough on fences. That's why we use high-quality, galvanized steel for our chain link fences, which provides excellent rust and corrosion resistance. We also offer optional vinyl coatings for added protection and aesthetic appeal. With a chain link fence from Orta Metalworks LLC, you can have peace of mind knowing that your property is secure and protected.
process: Step 1: Site Assessment – We assess your property and determine the best fence layout.
Step 2: Material Selection – We help you choose the right chain link fence options.
Step 3: Installation – Our team installs your fence with precision and efficiency.
Step 4: Quality Check – We ensure that your fence meets our high standards.

faq.question: How long does it take to install a chain link fence?
faq.answer: The installation time depends on the size and complexity of the project, but we typically complete chain link fence installations in a timely manner.

faq.question: What is the lifespan of a chain link fence in Tucson?
faq.answer: With proper maintenance, a chain link fence from Orta Metalworks LLC can last for many years, even in the harsh Tucson climate.

faq.question: Do you offer different colors of chain link fencing?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer chain link fencing with vinyl coatings in a variety of colors to match your property's aesthetic.

services.name: Wood Fences
services.shortDescription: Classic wood fences for privacy, security, and natural beauty.
services.description:
Wood fences offer a warm and inviting aesthetic while providing privacy and security for your Tucson home. At Orta Metalworks LLC, we build custom wood fences using high-quality materials and expert craftsmanship. We understand the unique challenges of Tucson's climate and construct our wood fences to withstand the elements.

We offer a variety of wood fence styles, including privacy fences, picket fences, and split-rail fences. Whether you're looking to create a secluded backyard oasis or add a charming touch to your property, we can design and build a wood fence that meets your needs. Our experienced team uses proven techniques to ensure that your fence is sturdy, durable, and visually appealing.

We use pressure-treated lumber to protect our wood fences from rot, decay, and insect damage. We also offer staining and sealing services to enhance the natural beauty of the wood and provide added protection from the elements. With a wood fence from Orta Metalworks LLC, you can enjoy the beauty and privacy of a natural wood fence for years to come.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation – We discuss your design preferences and property layout.
Step 2: Material Selection – We help you choose the right wood and finishes.
Step 3: Construction – Our team builds your fence with precision and care.
Step 4: Finishing Touches – We stain, seal, and inspect your fence for quality.

faq.question: How often should I stain or seal my wood fence?
faq.answer: We recommend staining or sealing your wood fence every 2-3 years to protect it from the elements and maintain its beauty.

faq.question: What type of wood is best for fences in Tucson?
faq.answer: Pressure-treated pine is a popular choice for wood fences in Tucson due to its durability and resistance to rot and insect damage.

faq.question: Can you build a custom gate for my wood fence?
faq.answer: Yes, we can build a custom gate to match your wood fence, providing secure and convenient access to your property.

services.name: Automatic Gates
services.shortDescription: Convenient and secure automatic gate systems for residential and commercial properties.
services.description:
Enhance the security and convenience of your property with an automatic gate system from Orta Metalworks LLC. We offer a wide range of automatic gate solutions for residential and commercial properties in Tucson. Our experienced team can design and install a custom automatic gate system that meets your specific needs and budget.

We offer sliding gates, swing gates, and barrier gates, all equipped with reliable and user-friendly automatic gate operators. Our automatic gate systems can be integrated with access control systems, such as keypads, card readers, and intercoms, for added security and convenience. We also offer remote control options and smartphone integration for easy operation.

Tucson's unique environment demands gate systems that can withstand extreme temperatures and occasional dust storms. Our automatic gate operators are built to last and are designed for reliable performance in the Arizona climate. We also offer maintenance and repair services to ensure that your automatic gate system continues to operate smoothly for years to come.
process: Step 1: Site Evaluation – We assess your property and determine the best gate system.
Step 2: System Design – We design a custom automatic gate system to meet your needs.
Step 3: Installation – Our team installs your gate system with precision and expertise.
Step 4: System Integration – We integrate your gate system with access control systems.

faq.question: How much does an automatic gate system cost?
faq.answer: The cost of an automatic gate system depends on the size, style, and features of the gate, as well as the complexity of the installation. Contact us for a free quote.

faq.question: Can I control my automatic gate with my smartphone?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer automatic gate systems that can be controlled with a smartphone app, allowing you to open and close your gate from anywhere.

faq.question: What type of maintenance is required for an automatic gate system?
faq.answer: Regular maintenance, such as lubricating moving parts and checking the gate operator, is recommended to ensure smooth and reliable operation.

services.name: Security Fences
services.shortDescription: Heavy-duty security fences for maximum protection and peace of mind.
services.description:
When security is paramount, Orta Metalworks LLC delivers robust security fence solutions tailored to your specific needs. We understand the importance of protecting your Tucson property, whether it's a residential estate, commercial facility, or industrial complex. Our security fences are designed and built to deter intruders and provide a strong visual deterrent.

We offer a range of security fence options, including high-security chain link, ornamental steel, and anti-climb fences. These fences can be customized with features such as razor wire, barbed wire, and anti-cut mesh for enhanced protection. Our experienced team ensures that your security fence is installed correctly and meets all relevant security standards.

Tucson's unique security challenges require specialized solutions. Our security fences are built to withstand the harsh desert environment and provide reliable protection against unauthorized access. We also offer security gate systems that can be integrated with access control systems for added security and convenience. Trust Orta Metalworks LLC to provide the security fence solutions you need to protect your property and assets.
process: Step 1: Security Assessment – We assess your property's security needs and vulnerabilities.
Step 2: Fence Design – We design a custom security fence to meet your specific requirements.
Step 3: Installation – Our team installs your security fence with precision and expertise.
Step 4: Security Integration – We integrate your fence with security systems for added protection.

faq.question: What is the best type of security fence for my property?
faq.answer: The best type of security fence depends on your specific security needs and the type of property you are protecting. We can help you choose the right fence based on your budget and security requirements.

faq.question: Can you install security cameras on my security fence?
faq.answer: Yes, we can integrate security cameras with your security fence to provide comprehensive surveillance of your property.

faq.question: Do you offer maintenance services for security fences?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer maintenance services to ensure that your security fence remains in top condition and continues to provide reliable protection.

services.name: Fence Repair
services.shortDescription: Prompt and reliable fence repair services to restore your fence's integrity and appearance.
services.description:
The Arizona sun, monsoon season, and general wear and tear can take a toll on any fence. Orta Metalworks LLC offers comprehensive fence repair services throughout Tucson to restore the integrity and appearance of your existing fence. Instead of replacing your entire fence, our skilled technicians can often repair damaged sections, saving you time and money.

We handle all types of fence repairs, including wood rot repair, post replacement, gate repair, and damage from weather or accidents. Whether you have a chain link, wood, wrought iron, or vinyl fence, we have the expertise to get it back in top condition. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure that your fence repair is durable and long-lasting.

Don't let a damaged fence compromise your security or curb appeal. Contact Orta Metalworks LLC for prompt and reliable fence repair services. We'll assess the damage, provide a detailed estimate, and get your fence back in shape quickly and efficiently.
process: Step 1: Damage Assessment – We inspect your fence to identify the extent of the damage.
Step 2: Repair Estimate – We provide a detailed estimate for the necessary repairs.
Step 3: Material Procurement – We source high-quality materials for your fence repair.
Step 4: Repair Execution – Our team repairs your fence with precision and expertise.

faq.question: How do I know if my fence needs repair or replacement?
faq.answer: If your fence has significant damage, such as widespread rot, leaning posts, or large holes, it may need to be replaced. However, if the damage is localized, repair may be a more cost-effective option.

faq.question: How long does it take to repair a fence?
faq.answer: The time required to repair a fence depends on the extent of the damage. Minor repairs can often be completed in a few hours, while more extensive repairs may take a day or two.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency fence repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer emergency fence repair services for situations that require immediate attention, such as storm damage or security breaches.

reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: Orta Metalworks installed a beautiful wrought iron fence around my property in Sam Hughes. The quality of the work is outstanding, and the fence looks fantastic. The team was professional and efficient, and they completed the project on time and within budget. I highly recommend them!

reviews.name: David S.
reviews.text: I needed a chain link fence installed quickly to secure my business property. Orta Metalworks was able to get the job done fast and at a reasonable price. There were a few minor snags, but they addressed them promptly. Overall, I'm very satisfied with the service.

reviews.name: Linda K.
reviews.text: My wood fence was damaged in a recent storm. Orta Metalworks came out and repaired it quickly and professionally. They matched the existing wood perfectly, and the fence looks as good as new. I appreciate their prompt service and attention to detail.

reviews.name: Robert B.
reviews.text: We hired Orta Metalworks to install an automatic gate at our ranch. They were very knowledgeable and helpful in choosing the right system for our needs. The installation was smooth, and the gate works perfectly. It has made life so much easier. Great job!

reviews.name: Susan L.
reviews.text: We needed a high-security fence installed quickly to protect our construction site from theft. Orta Metalworks provided a strong, durable fence that has given us peace of mind. The installation crew was professional and efficient.

reviews.name: Michael P.
reviews.text: Excellent service! Orta Metalworks repaired a section of my fence that had been damaged by a fallen tree branch. They were quick to respond, provided a fair quote, and completed the work flawlessly. I would definitely recommend them to anyone needing fence repairs.

serviceAreas.content:
Orta Metalworks LLC is proud to offer our expert fence installation and repair services to the residents and businesses of Tucson, Arizona. We understand the unique needs of Tucson property owners, from securing your property and enhancing its aesthetic appeal to providing safety for your family and pets. Our team is dedicated to delivering high-quality craftsmanship and exceptional customer service.

Whether you're looking for a wrought iron fence to complement the Southwestern architecture, a durable chain-link fence for added security, or a custom-designed fence to enhance your landscape, Orta Metalworks LLC has the expertise to bring your vision to life. We use only the finest materials and employ proven installation techniques to ensure your fence will stand the test of time.
